name: ActionBar
primaryUseCase: A floating action bar component that appears at the bottom of the viewport for displaying contextual actions, typically used for batch operations on selected items.

name: Alert
primaryUseCase: A versatile alert component for displaying contextual feedback messages with multiple severity types, optional icons, and auto-dismiss functionality.

name: Avatar
primaryUseCase: A flexible avatar component for displaying user profile images, icons, or initials with various sizes and shapes.

name: Badge
primaryUseCase: A small badge component for displaying notification counts, status indicators, or labels. Can be used standalone or as a wrapper around other elements.

name: Button
primaryUseCase: A versatile button component with multiple variants, sizes, states, and icon support for user interactions and form submissions.

name: Calendar
primaryUseCase: A calendar component for selecting single or multiple dates with month/year navigation and date range restrictions.

name: Card
primaryUseCase: A flexible card container component for grouping related content with optional header, footer, and interactive capabilities.

name: Carousel
primaryUseCase: A carousel component for cycling through content with touch/drag support, keyboard navigation, and smooth animations. Built without external dependencies, following shadcn/ui patterns.

name: Checkbox
primaryUseCase: A customizable checkbox component with support for controlled/uncontrolled states, indeterminate state, and checkbox groups.

name: Collapsible
primaryUseCase: A container component that manages collapsible/expandable content with controlled and uncontrolled state support.

name: ConfigProvider
primaryUseCase: A context provider that manages global UI configuration including theme, locale, direction (RTL/LTR), and default component sizes. Wraps the entire application to provide consistent configuration.

name: DatePicker
primaryUseCase: A comprehensive date picker component with calendar dropdown, keyboard navigation, manual input support, and extensive customization options.

name: Dialog
primaryUseCase: A modal dialog component with backdrop overlay, focus management, keyboard navigation, and smooth animations for displaying content that requires user attention.

name: Drawer
primaryUseCase: A slide-out panel component that appears from screen edges with header, body, footer sections, and smooth animations for displaying supplementary content or navigation.

name: Dropdown
primaryUseCase: A flexible dropdown menu component with nested menu support, keyboard navigation, and customizable triggers for displaying contextual actions and options.

name: Form
primaryUseCase: A form component built on React Hook Form with compound pattern. Provides Form.Item for field-level validation display, label alignment, and consistent form layout with Zod schema integration.

name: Icons
primaryUseCase: A collection of SVG icon components for common UI elements including chevrons, status indicators, sorting arrows, and action icons.

name: Input
primaryUseCase: A versatile input component supporting text, textarea, prefix/suffix elements, various sizes, and validation states for form data entry.

name: InputGroup
primaryUseCase: A component for grouping related input elements together with addons (prefix/suffix buttons, text, or icons) for a cohesive form control appearance.

name: Menu
primaryUseCase: A flexible menu component for navigation with support for nested items, collapsible sections, active state management, and sidebar integration.

name: MultiValueInput
primaryUseCase: An input component that allows users to enter multiple values as tags/chips, with support for keyboard entry, removal, and custom separators.

name: Notification
primaryUseCase: A notification component for displaying temporary messages with various types, custom icons, auto-dismiss functionality, and close button support.

name: Pagination
primaryUseCase: A pagination component for navigating through large datasets with page numbers, previous/next buttons, and optional total count display.

name: Popover
primaryUseCase: A floating popover component for displaying rich content in an overlay with customizable triggers, placement, and interaction modes.

name: Progress
primaryUseCase: A progress indicator component supporting line and circle variants for visualizing task completion or loading states.

name: Radio
primaryUseCase: A radio button component for mutually exclusive selections with support for radio groups and controlled/uncontrolled states.

name: Segment
primaryUseCase: A segmented control component for single or multiple selection with visual indicator and size variants.

name: Select
primaryUseCase: A feature-rich select dropdown with search, keyboard navigation, custom options, grouped options, and creatable functionality.

name: Skeleton
primaryUseCase: A skeleton placeholder component for indicating loading content with animated pulse effect.

name: Slider
primaryUseCase: An interactive slider component for selecting numeric values within a range with keyboard support, marks, and tooltips.

name: Spinner
primaryUseCase: A loading spinner component for indicating indeterminate loading or processing states.

name: StatusIcon
primaryUseCase: A status icon component that displays contextual icons with appropriate colors for success, info, warning, and danger states.

name: Steps
primaryUseCase: A step indicator component for displaying multi-step processes with current progress and status.

name: Switcher
primaryUseCase: A toggle switch component for binary on/off states with loading support and custom content.

name: Table
primaryUseCase: A flexible table component with support for borders, hover effects, compact mode, and overflow handling.

name: Tabs
primaryUseCase: A tab navigation component for organizing content into switchable panels with underline or pill variants.

name: Tag
primaryUseCase: A tag component for labeling, categorizing, or highlighting content with optional prefix and suffix elements.

name: TimeInput
primaryUseCase: A time input component with separate fields for hours, minutes, seconds, and AM/PM with keyboard navigation support.

name: Timeline
primaryUseCase: A timeline component for displaying chronological events or activities with connecting lines.

name: toast
primaryUseCase: A programmatic toast notification system for displaying temporary messages with customizable placement, transitions, and auto-dismiss functionality.

name: Tooltip
primaryUseCase: A tooltip component for displaying helpful information on hover or focus with customizable placement.

name: Upload
primaryUseCase: A file upload component with drag-and-drop support, file list display, validation, and custom file item rendering.

name: ActionLink
primaryUseCase: A styled link component with theme color support for navigation and actions, supporting both internal routing and external links.

name: AdvancedFilterBuilder
primaryUseCase: A sophisticated filter builder component for creating complex query conditions with field selection, operators, values, and nested logical grouping (AND/OR/NOT). Supports recursive rule groups, multiple field types (text, number, select, date, boolean), and query string generation/parsing.

name: Affix
primaryUseCase: A component that makes its children stick to the viewport when scrolling past a certain point.

name: AuthorityCheck
primaryUseCase: A wrapper component that conditionally renders its children based on role-based access control. Compares user authorities against required authorities and only renders content when there's a match.

name: AutoComplete
primaryUseCase: An autocomplete input component with dropdown suggestions, keyboard navigation, and custom option rendering.

name: Chart
primaryUseCase: A comprehensive charting component built on Recharts, providing LineChart, AreaChart, BarChart, PieChart, RadarChart, and CohortChart components with consistent styling and configuration.

name: ClockProgress
primaryUseCase: A circular clock-style progress indicator that fills like a clock hand sweeping from 12 o'clock position.

name: ConfirmDialog
primaryUseCase: A confirmation dialog component with status icons, customizable buttons, and action handlers for user confirmations.

name: Container
primaryUseCase: A responsive container component with predefined max-widths for consistent page layouts and content centering.

name: CustomFormatInput
primaryUseCase: A specialized input component for custom number formatting (phone numbers, credit cards, etc.) using react-number-format.

name: DataTable
primaryUseCase: A feature-rich data table component built on TanStack Table with sorting, pagination, row selection, loading states, and skeleton loading support.

name: DebouceInput
primaryUseCase: An input component that debounces onChange events to reduce the frequency of updates, ideal for search inputs and performance optimization.

name: Divider
primaryUseCase: A simple divider component for visually separating content with horizontal or vertical orientation.

name: EditorTools
primaryUseCase: A comprehensive collection of toolbar button components for TipTap-based rich text editors. Provides formatting controls including text styling (bold, italic, strikethrough), headings, lists, code blocks, blockquotes, images, and history management (undo/redo). Each tool button integrates with TipTap editor instance and shows active states.

name: EmptyState
primaryUseCase: A complete empty state component with decorative background patterns and customizable illustration placement. Provides a polished way to display empty states with visual hierarchy.

name: FullCalendar
primaryUseCase: A comprehensive, full-featured calendar component with multiple view modes (day, week, month, year, agenda), drag-and-drop event management, event resizing, customizable rendering, and extensive date utilities. Built with React context for state management and supports both single-day and multi-day events with intelligent positioning.

name: Gantt
primaryUseCase: A comprehensive Gantt chart component for project management with task scheduling, dependencies, progress tracking, drag-and-drop, resizing, and interactive timeline visualization. Supports multiple view modes (Hour, QuarterDay, HalfDay, Day, Week, Month, QuarterYear, Year), task types (task, milestone, project), and customizable columns for task list display.

name: GrowShrinkTag
primaryUseCase: A tag component that visually indicates positive or negative changes with color coding and directional icons.

name: GrowShrinkValue
primaryUseCase: A component for displaying numeric values with directional indicators and customizable positive/negative styling.

name: Historgram
primaryUseCase: A simple histogram visualization component for displaying data distribution with range highlighting.

name: IconFrame
primaryUseCase: A container component for displaying icons with consistent styling. Supports multiple visual variants including default bordered, thick ring, layered, and layered with background styles. Useful for creating consistent icon presentations in cards, lists, and dashboards.

name: InfoBar
primaryUseCase: A visual indicator showing three levels (low, medium, high) with color-coded bars, similar to signal strength indicators.

name: loaders
primaryUseCase: A collection of specialized skeleton loader components for common UI patterns including media items, table rows, and text blocks.

name: Loading
primaryUseCase: A versatile loading component with two display modes: default (replaces content) and cover (overlays content).

name: NavToggle
primaryUseCase: A simple icon component that switches between open and close panel icons based on toggle state.

name: NumericInput
primaryUseCase: A specialized input component for numeric values with formatting support using react-number-format library.

name: NumericInputStepper
primaryUseCase: Increment/decrement buttons for numeric inputs with min/max constraints and step control.

name: OtpInput
primaryUseCase: A one-time password input component that renders multiple single-character input fields. Supports auto-focus navigation, paste handling, keyboard navigation, and validation states.

name: OverflowTabs
primaryUseCase: An intelligent tabs component that automatically moves overflowing tabs into a dropdown menu based on available space.

name: PasswordInput
primaryUseCase: An enhanced password input component that extends the base Input with a visibility toggle button. Allows users to show/hide password text with an eye icon toggle.

name: PatternInput
primaryUseCase: A formatted input component that applies pattern-based formatting to user input using react-number-format. Ideal for phone numbers, credit cards, dates, and other structured data entry with automatic formatting.

name: PopoverFilter
primaryUseCase: A popover-based multi-select filter component with search functionality. Displays a list of checkboxes within a popover, allowing users to filter data by selecting multiple options with real-time search.

name: ReactionEmojiPicker
primaryUseCase: A popover-based emoji picker for quick reactions with customizable emoji set and trigger button.

name: RichTextEditor
primaryUseCase: A feature-rich WYSIWYG text editor built on TipTap with StarterKit extensions. Provides formatting tools including bold, italic, strikethrough, code, headings, lists, blockquotes, code blocks, and horizontal rules. Includes built-in toolbar with undo/redo functionality and supports custom toolbar configuration.

name: SegmentProgressBar
primaryUseCase: A progress bar divided into discrete segments that fill based on percentage. Provides a visual representation of progress through distinct steps or stages rather than a continuous bar.

name: SelectInputWithPrefix
primaryUseCase: A display component for select input values with optional prefix icon or element.

name: SelectOptionWithPrefix
primaryUseCase: A display component for select dropdown options with prefix icon and selection indicator.

name: StatisticCard
primaryUseCase: A flexible card component designed for displaying statistics and metrics. Supports two visual styles: default bordered card and inset card with nested appearance. Includes optional header and footer sections.

name: StickyRegion
primaryUseCase: A performant sticky container that fixes its children to the viewport when scrolling past a configurable threshold. Optimized to only trigger re-renders when crossing the sticky threshold, not on every scroll event.

name: SyntaxHighlighter
primaryUseCase: A code syntax highlighting component using react-syntax-highlighter with oneDark theme.

name: ToggleDrawer
primaryUseCase: A drawer component with built-in toggle button and imperative handle for programmatic control.

name: UsersAvatarGroup
primaryUseCase: A specialized avatar group component for displaying multiple users with tooltips, random colors for initials, and click handling.

name: VectorMap
primaryUseCase: An SVG-based interactive vector map component for displaying geographic data. Supports hover tooltips, click handlers, and customizable layer styling.

name: Wizard
primaryUseCase: A reusable, generic multi-step wizard component for guiding users through complex processes. Supports both horizontal and vertical layouts with smooth Framer Motion animations, click navigation between steps, custom icons, completed step indicators, and controlled component behavior. Perfect for onboarding flows, multi-step forms, and sequential processes.
